title: Plan Output
description: Schema for the structured output of the plan stage (aide-plan skill).

tasks.description: Implementation tasks, each sized for a subagent (2-5 minute execution).

feature_id.description: Feature ID this task belongs to, references spec.json feature.

title.description: Short summary of what this task implements.

description.description: Detailed implementation instructions for the subagent.

files_to_touch.description: Files the subagent is expected to create or modify.

depends_on.description: Task IDs that must complete before this task can start. Empty array means no dependencies.

order_hint.description: Suggested execution position for ordering hints.

estimated_order.description: All task IDs in suggested execution order (topological).
